opportunity.title: I wrote a open source iMessage for your AI agents
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The bigger challenge isn't the transport layer—it's semantic interoperability when agents from different frameworks exchange messages. You'll quickly discover that without strict type contracts and schema validation, you'll spend more time debugging protocol mismatches than building features. Consider baked-in schema negotiation where agents discover compatible message structures before routing begins.
actions.reasoning: I have built multi-agent systems with custom message protocols and have dealt with semantic interoperability between different agent frameworks firsthand.
